calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-05-2021 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Approval Of Private Attorneys General Act (Paga) Settlement
Off Calendar Apr-29-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF AMIE PFEIFER's Motion For Approval Of Private Attorneys General Act (PAGA) Settlement.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's motion for approval of Private Attorneys General Act (PAGA) is granted. Plaintiff shows that the overall amount of the proposed settlement is fair and adequate in view of the purposes and policies of PAGA, taking into account such factors as the adequacy of the civil penalties in light of the potential maximum if the matter were to go to verdict and the risks of litigation. (Lab. Code sec. 2699(l)(2); see Haralson v. U.S. Aviation Services Corp. (N.D. Cal. 2019) 383 F.Supp.3d 959, 972; O'Connor v. Uber Technologies, Inc. (N.D. Cal. 2016) 201 F.Supp.3d 1110, 1132-35.)

Order signed. Separate Final Judgment signed.
